comment.body: Alma, friday tenors' vol has weekend vol embedded in it, while mondays' vol are almost always lowest in a week, when analyzing change of vol or skew along the tenor axis, is there a way to normalize vol to account for this "weekend effect"?

comment.body:
Here’s the article:

https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08839-w

Upon reading comments this tech has only been proven on very small quantities of memory (kilobytes) and might take some time to expand from there. But it seems to be legit, according to AI. Way over my head trying to read that paper tough 😂
